query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  SUM(raw_payload IS NOT NULL) AS com_payload,
  SUM(raw_payload IS NULL) AS sem_payload,
  SUM(status_original IS NOT NULL AND status_original != 'Não Informado') AS com_status_real
FROM processos;
